title: craft bones
description: did you ever want to craft bones? no? here you go anyways!
body: Are you looking for a mod that you can craft bones with? and you couldnt find what you were looking for? then oh boy this mod is for you! this adds a bone fragment (basicly a tooth) you get from animals by killing them. also an uncolored bone to minecraft! get it by crafting 3 gunpowder across a line then to make a bone you take 1 uncolored bone, 1 piece of string, and one white dye and thats it!
